'''Tiu Zax''' was an [[Omwati/Legends|Omwati]] female serving as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] in the time following the resolution of the [[Swarm War]]. She was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|knighted]] shortly before the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Zax participated in [[Operation Roundabout]] as part of Team Tauntaun, which was tasked with kidnapping [[Chief of State (Corellia)|Chief of State]] [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]. However, it was a trap, just like [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] Team Purella's mission, and Tiu's fellow teammembers, [[Tahiri Veila]] and [[Doran Sarkin-Tainer]], had to flee. Tainer had the idea to disguise Tiu as being dead, so that he and Tahiri could escape. Tiu then stayed in Sal-Solo's estate and did recon work. She was later retrieved by [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and did more recon work with her.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
